title: Freedom of Espresso celebrating 30 years of coffee in Syracuse
summary: Freedom of Espresso, a local coffee business with 30 years of operations in Syracuse, is being honored with a proclamation from Mayor Ben Walsh on December 5, 2025. The business has expanded to multiple locations across Central New York and represents a successful local enterprise in the community.

political_signal.description: Mayor's recognition of local business longevity and community presence demonstrates support for established small business and local economic development

processing_notes: Article is primarily promotional/celebratory in nature
No direct CIO operational relevance; relevant for business-community relations context
Addresses: 115 Solar Street, Syracuse (near Franklin Square Park)
No budget, policy, or administrative impacts noted
